title: Systems Administrator
description: We're hiring a Systems Administrator at Figma. This is an exciting opportunity to join our creative, remote-first, ambitious team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Design Tools, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Manage cloud infrastructure provisioning and configuration
Implement security controls and access management policies
Monitor system performance and optimize resource utilization
Automate routine administrative tasks using scripting languages
Manage identity and access provisioning for users and systems
Maintain documentation and disaster recovery procedures
benefits: Flexible work schedule and remote work options
Wellness programs and gym membership reimbursement
